findings.description: testBuildTransaction_dustChangeAbsorbed only verified hex was non-empty but did not verify output count. Strengthened by deserializing tx and asserting 1 output (no change output).
findings.resolution: Fixed in review commit — now verifies parsedTx.outputs.size == 1

findings.description: testBuildTransaction_correctInputsAndOutputs only verified hex format but not structure. Strengthened by deserializing tx and asserting 1 input, 2 outputs.
findings.resolution: Fixed in review commit — now verifies parsedTx.inputs.size == 1 and parsedTx.outputs.size == 2

findings.description: All 7 TDD anchors present: testFetchBalance, testUtxoSelectionSingleInput, testUtxoSelectionMultipleInputs, testUtxoSelectionInsufficientFunds, testChangeHandlingDust, testFeeCalculation, testTransactionConstruction
Good edge case coverage: zero balance, empty UTXO list, exact match UTXO, dust threshold boundary (545 vs 546), high fee rate, minimum tx size
33 tests total, all independent and isolated. Each test has meaningful assertions verifying actual computed values.

summary: All TDD anchors present. Two transaction tests strengthened with structural assertions after deserialization. 33 tests pass, good edge case coverage. Test quality is strong.
